## Verses (8)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Out of the deep have I sent up my cry to you, O Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Lord, let my voice come before you: let your ears be awake to the voice of my prayer. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | O Jah, if you took note of every sin, who would go free? | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | But there is forgiveness with you, so that you may be feared. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | I am waiting for the Lord, my soul is waiting for him, and my hope is in his word. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | My soul is watching for the Lord more than those who are watching for the morning; yes, more than the watchers for the morning. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | O Israel, have hope in the Lord; for with the Lord is mercy and full salvation. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | And he will make Israel free from all his sins. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
